input.question: Compare the average overall, professor, content, and difficulty ratings across all evaluations

payload.question: Compare the average overall, professor, content, and difficulty ratings across all evaluations

output.sql:
SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Professor' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(professor_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Content' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(content_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Difficulty' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

visualization.title: Average Overall, Professor, Content, and Difficulty Ratings (All Evaluations)

payload.sql:
SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Professor' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(professor_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Content' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(content_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Difficulty' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM evaluations
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
